title: Low income countries in 1990 have experienced markedly different growth paths
subtitle: Indexed constant USD (1990=100), grouped by current income classification.

scenes.text: Of the countries classified as low income in 1990 one country has managed to move to [emphasis: high income] by 2024.
Four countries have moved to [emphasis: upper middle income].
A number of countries experienced sufficient growth to be classified as [emphasis: lower-middle income ]by 2024.
And a group of countries have been unable to sustain growth sufficient to escape the [emphasis: low income ]classification after 25 years.
